title: A* - A4 Display Book - 20 Pages - A4 Folder with 20 Plastic Wallets - Assorted Document Wallet Display Case for A4 Paper
features: PLASTIC WALLETS x 1: These plastic storage folders A4 are great to display your work. These plastic folders A4 sized, are very versatile. Whether you want to use them as part of your office desk organisation or university essentials, or school supplies, these folders with plastic pockets are ideal to store and hold your work.

20 Plastic Sleeves: This presentation folder x 1 is a great display folder with it's plastic sleeves, the documents inside can be easily seen and can be placed back to back, to make use of the space, or you can even place multiple documents if you have copies behind this, to save space in the plastic wallets.

PORTFOLIO FOLDER A4: This is an A4 plastic folder with plastic sleeves to ensure your main printed documents can easily fit inside the document folder and be displayed easily. With 20 pages, this folder can be used for office organisation and is an essential aspect of your office stationery.
DIMENSIONS OF THE FOLDER ORGANISER: These excellent presentation folders with pockets a4 have dimensions of approximately W x H x D: 240 x 310 x 22mm and come in assorted colours of black and grey

A* STATIONERY: With shorthand notepads, envelopes, writing pads, notebooks and pens, pencil cases, folders, date stamp, files, pens, markers, sticky notes and more, you can update your pencil case and stationary supplies easily and create a great office set of equipment, so you don't waste time and can get stuck in!
description: " A* - A4 Display Book x 1 - 20 Pages - A4 Folder with Plastic Wallets (20) - Assorted Document Wallet Display Case for A4 Paper - Project Book Great for Office Supplies, University Essentials and School Stationery This A4 display book comes with 20 plastic wallet sleeves so that you can pop in your documents and display them in a professional manor to friends and colleagues; Use is as a document folder or way to organise similar papers, you can pop multiple sheets into the sleeves and have them back to back to make use of the sleeves, and if you have duplicate pages of the documents you can pop them behind the front paper; The A* stationery range by The Design Group has lots of other stationery supplies such as different coloured paper clips, ink stamp pads, paper and coloured pens, so if you need to refresh and replenish your stationery sets we have got your sorted! Key Features: - Display Book - A4 - 20 plastic Sleeves - Great for Office, Work, Home, University and University - Comes in Assorted Colours of Black / Grey Contents: - 1 x A* A4 Display Book with 20 Plastic Sleeves "
